name: recovery-authority
description: Require proven recovery before Codex performs destructive operations.

interface.longDescription: Restore-tests destructive filesystem, SQLite, PostgreSQL, and Git effects, then requires separate human approval before releasing a short-lived capability.
defaultPrompt: Safely delete these files with a recovery proof.
Prove this PostgreSQL deletion can be recovered before running it.
Show operations that are waiting for my approval.
Show the recovery status for this operation.
